subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art He Whose mercy hath preceded all things, Whose grace hath been all-encompassing, Whose proof hath been perfected, Whose evidence hath been made complete, and Whose sovereignty hath become manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی انت الذی سبقت رحمتک و سبغت نعمتک و تمت حجتک و کمل برهانک و ظهر سلطانک و
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
